name: awx-deploy
title: AWX Deploy
description: Browse, launch, and monitor AWX job templates and running jobs.
author: Ahmims

commands.name: search-templates
commands.title: Search Templates
commands.subtitle: AWX
commands.description: Browse job templates (paginated, filterable) and launch a selected one.

commands.name: running-jobs
commands.title: Running Jobs
commands.subtitle: AWX
commands.description: View currently running AWX jobs and cancel them.

commands.name: workflow-history
commands.title: Workflow History
commands.subtitle: AWX
commands.description: Workflow templates run in the last 7 days, with timing and usage stats.

preferences.name: awxUrl
preferences.title: AWX URL
preferences.description: Base URL of your AWX instance, e.g. https://awx.example.com

preferences.name: awxToken
preferences.title: API Token
preferences.description: AWX OAuth2 / personal access token used as a Bearer token.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
